headline: AMERICAS GOLD & SILVER BREAKS RECORDS: Q1 Silver Output +76% to 787K oz, $122.6M Cash
snippet: Americas Gold & Silver (NYSE-A: USAS) posted record Q1 2026 silver production of 787,000 oz — a 76% year-on-year increase from 446,000 oz — with 830,000 oz sold, US$122.6M in cash, and both operations completing a full year without lost-time accidents.

headline: MAKO MINING POSTS RECORD Q1: 13,721 oz Gold, ~$69M Revenue, Zero Debt — $96M Cash on Hand
snippet: TSX-V gold producer Mako Mining (CVE: MKO) delivered a record first quarter in 2026 — 13,721 oz gold produced, approximately US$69M revenue, and US$96.1M in cash with zero debt — a case study in how high gold prices are amplifying margins for lean, low-cost operators.

headline: THE SILVER BULL IS BACK: Producers and Explorers Positioned for Next Leg as Deficit Deepens
snippet: With silver pushing above $80/oz and facing its sixth straight annual supply deficit, analysts are flagging the leverage available in silver producers and junior explorers — this April 16 overview identifies which tier of the market stands to capture the most upside if silver retests its January high of $121.

headline: SWISS BANK UBP STANDS BY $6,000 GOLD: '$4,800 Is Not the Top' — Manages $233B in Assets
snippet: Swiss private bank UBP, overseeing $233B in client assets, reaffirmed its $6,000/oz gold price target for year-end 2026 even as spot trades roughly 15% below that level — citing structural central bank demand, dollar debasement, and fiscal instability as the three persistent drivers of this bull market.

headline: COPPER CONCENTRATE CRUNCH: 300,000T Projected Shortfall Repricing Junior Discoverers
snippet: A projected 300,000-tonne copper concentrate shortfall is pushing a valuation premium onto exploration-stage assets with clear development pathways — analysts cite Faraday Copper (TSX: FDY) in Arizona, Solaris Resources advancing Ecuador permitting, and Foran Mining commissioning McIlvenna Bay in Saskatchewan as examples.

headline: POWER METALLIC HITS BEST EVER COPPER: 16.55m at 10.08% Cu at Lion Zone, Quebec
snippet: Power Metallic Mines (TSX-V: PNPN) returned its best copper intersection to date at the Lion zone of the Nisk polymetallic project in Quebec — hole PML-26-049 hit 16.55m at 10.08% Cu, while PML-26-050 cut 27.1m at 2.17% CuEq including 4.76m at 10.43% CuEq — with 37 holes still awaiting assay.

headline: METALSOURCE MINING: 1.1 kg/t AgEq Over 3.1m at Silver Hill — System Now Extends 260m Down-Dip
snippet: Metalsource Mining (CSE: MSM) intersected 1,100 g/t AgEq over 3.1m at its Silver Hill Project near Lexington, NC, with SH26-08 also returning 447 g/t AgEq over 13m — continued high-grade hits expanding a polymetallic system now traced 260m from surface across multiple drill holes.

headline: MAINSTREAM ECONOMISTS vs. GOLD: Who Is Actually Winning the Fight?
snippet: Money Metals brings in AQR Capital's former head of market research Aaron Brown to assess whether establishment economists still have a credible framework for dismissing gold — and why $4,800+ gold suggests the answer, increasingly, is no.
